Code fragment: public final TableField<FileRecord, UInteger> FID = createField(DSL.name("fid"), org.jooq.impl.SQLDataType.INTEGERUNSIGNED.nullable(false).identity(true), this, "");
Explanation: The table has a synthetic auto-increment primary key 'fid' even though a natural unique constraint exists on (uid, name) via KEY_FILE_UID, which could serve as a composite primary key. Consider using the composite key (uid, name) as the primary key instead of the synthetic 'fid' column.

Code fragment: public final TableField<UserRecord, UInteger> UID = createField(DSL.name("uid"), org.jooq.impl.SQLDataType.INTEGERUNSIGNED.nullable(false).identity(true), this, "");
